Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.description: A monthly habit tracker dashboard for a user.

uid.description: The user ID of the dashboard owner.

monthYear.description: The month and year of the dashboard, formatted as YYYY-MM.

habits.description: The list of habit names (up to 12).

completions.description: Map of habit completions. Key is '{habitIndex}-{day}', value is boolean.

sleep.description: Map of sleep data. Key is '{day}', value is string (e.g., '8hrs').

/users/{userId}/dashboards/{monthYear}.description: Stores the user's monthly habit tracking dashboards.
